meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe are here for you during any small domestic or commercial move. Offering packing and storage - we are more than just a man with a van in Worthing. Contact us today for your free quote!

Our customers are both domestic and commercial businesses looking for a well-equipped, professional man with a van. Whether you're moving student accommodation, looking for a small house removal, needing assistance an office removals firm or even a single item delivery - we are here to help. We know that moving can be extremely time-consuming, which is tricky - especially when you lead a busy life. raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man with a Van Service

Moving flat or office? Need a professional service but without the hefty price tag? Look no further! Introducing Mark Ratcliffe's Man and Van Service...

How can we help you today?

Dependable Man with a Van Worthing

Providing Quality Removals and Flexibility

Mark Ratcliffe's man and van service is an acclaimed removals service perfect for smaller moves in Worthing and the neighbouring areas. Our customers are both domestic and commercial businesses looking for a well-equipped, professional man with a van. Whether you're moving student accommodation, looking for a small house removal, needing assistance an office removals firm or even a single item delivery - we are here to help. We know that moving can be extremely time-consuming, which is tricky - especially when you lead a busy life. That is why we have made our services flexible, we are available 7 days a week, we can help you move even on weekends at no extra cost. ‍

Friendly Service ‍

Our staff all genuinely care and want to make your move as smooth and effortless for you as possible. Our staff are always extremely polite and considerate which is why we believe our customers choose our service again and again. Regarding our man with a van service, your removals man will be familiar with the local area and therefore will always take the most efficient route to your destination - meaning no queues of traffic so the job can get done quickly! If you select a 'working driver,' he will be working until you are completely satisfied and settled in your new location. Your removals man will be prioritising your belongings - ensuring the safety facilities on the van are used to keep your belongings secure, like tie rails, furniture covers, loading ramps and sack trucks.

Man and Van Removals Worthing - Affordable Rates‍

As a removal company, we are proud to offer exceptional service at affordable rates. This is something we have always made sure to prioritise and always will do. We offer two different pricing options:

  • ‍Man with Van and working driver - £70 per hour ‍
  • Man with Van and driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All of the prices above are inclusive of vat and fuel (within a local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend moving.

More than just a House Removals Firm - Mark Ratcliffe's Moving & Storage ‍

House removals are not the same and they can be difficult! We know that there is so much more than just the work on your moving day. We want to make the whole process as easy for you as possible. We offer a packing and unpacking service for house removals and office removals - meaning the hard work really can be left to us and you can be stress-free in the time leading to your moving day. If you would rather pack yourself, we offer flat pack moving boxes and other high quality packing supplies which can be collected from our shop.
‍

If your new destination is not quite ready for you yet, we offer self storage units for just £30 (+ VAT) per week! These units are easily accessible meaning loading and unloading is straightforward. They are very large and clean - so your belongings stay in perfect condition whilst in storage.

Leave the hard work to us! Contact our team today or click the purple button at the top of the page for your free quote.
